P1.meaning: object manifold / bridge / role atlas consolidation
P1.main_value: defines what is encoded and how family patches are organized

P2.meaning: controlled update law + write-read separation + admissible update geometry
P2.main_value: controls how new evidence is written without destroying old structure

P3.meaning: shared object manifold to discriminative geometry compatibility
P3.main_value: decides whether encoded objects can become stable decisions and readouts

P4.meaning: brain-side mapping, probe execution, and causal falsification
P4.main_value: tests whether the abstract encoding theory survives contact with brain-side evidence

verdict.core_answer: P1-P4 now form a clean staged reconstruction of the encoding mechanism from object atlas to brain-side falsification.
verdict.next_theory_target: keep all next engineering actions explicitly attached to one of these four phases.
